# Verify Compliance Theatre

## Claim being tested

A compliance/security claim represents verified assurance.

## Alternative hypothesis

The claim uses templates, automation, badges, or institutional association to imply more assurance than exists.

## Data fields

- claim text
- certification scope
- auditor identity
- evidence ownership
- report date
- customer responsibility
- control status
- templates used
- limitations
- disclaimer text
- customer understanding

## Metrics

- scope ambiguity score
- claim-specificity score
- auditor evidence presence
- badge/claim repetition across pages
- customer confusion indicators
- policy/control mismatch

## Safe conclusion

"The compliance signal may overstate assurance if the claim lacks scope, independent audit evidence, or clear responsibility boundaries."
